zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hughes於1697年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾音巴時，他的父親Felix Hughes27歲，母親Mrs Ann Hughes23歲。他於1723年與Sarah Willes在美國維吉尼亞州盧度斯特林結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他於1739年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州盧度。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Hughes于1697年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾音巴时，他的父亲Felix Hughes27岁，母亲Mrs Ann Hughes23岁。他于1723年与Sarah Willes在美国弗吉尼亚州盧度斯特林结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他于1739年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州盧度。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Catholics hold just 7% of land in Ireland.
"Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
The Young Ireland rebellion of 1798 failed.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hughes was born in 1697, in Inver, County Donegal, Ireland, his father, Felix Hughes, was 27 and his mother, Mrs Ann Hughes, was 23. He married Sarah Willes in 1723, in Sterling, Loudoun, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He lived in Loudoun, Virginia, British Colonial America in 1739.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Hughes est né en 1697, à Inver, County Donegal, Irlande, son père, Felix Hughes, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Ann Hughes, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Willes en 1723, à Sterling, Loudoun, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il a vécu à Loudoun, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1739.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Hughes 1697 in Inver, County Donegal, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Felix Hughes 27 und seine Mutter Mrs Ann Hughes 23. Er hat 1723 in Sterling, Loudoun, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Sarah Willes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. 1739 hat er in Loudoun, Virginia, British Colonial America gelebt.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hughes(이)가 1697년 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸 인버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Felix Hughes(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Ann Hughes(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1723년 미국 버지니아 주 루다운 스털링에서 Sarah Willes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 1739년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 루다운에서 살았다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Hughes родился в 1697 г. в местности инвир, коунти доунегаль, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Felix Hughes было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Ann Hughes, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Willes в 1723 г. в местности стирлинг, лоудоун, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он жил в местности лоудоун, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1739 году.
